name: project-lifecycle
description: Project lifecycle governance plugin for Codex and Claude Code. Provides phase-based skills for setup, ideation, planning, architecture, design, implementation, infrastructure, QA, maintenance, governance, sync checks, impact analysis, debt collection, knowledge management, and optional tracker integration.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, govern, and review project lifecycle work
interface.longDescription: Use Project Lifecycle to guide work through setup, ideation, planning, architecture, design, implementation, infrastructure, QA, maintenance, and cross-cutting governance workflows. The same plugin source can be installed in Claude Code or Codex, with the installing tool acting as the primary runtime and the other tool available as an optional reviewer.
